votes.title: DC Bylaw No. 2026-20 (Region-wide Development Charges rate reduction)
votes.description: Passage of Region-wide DC Bylaw 2026-20 (and Nobleton area-specific bylaw), cutting development charge rates across all classes of development for the first time in the Region's 55-year history. Item I.2.4: main motion moved by Mayor Scarpitti, seconded by Mayor Pellegrini; carried as amended WITHOUT a recorded vote, so no individual member breakdown exists for the passage itself.
votes.verification_notes: Verified 2026-07-06 against the official May 21, 2026 Regional Council minutes (source_url). The passage carried on an unrecorded vote — the per-member signal from this meeting is the recorded amendment vote below (dc-cap-amendment-2026-05-21).

votes.title: Amendment: cap DC rates at prevailing rate at occupancy (defeated 4–13)
votes.description: Motion to Amend #2 during the DC Bylaw 2026-20 debate (item I.2.4), moved by Mayor Del Duca, seconded by Regional Councillor Jackson: assess DCs payable at occupancy for non-rental residential development at no higher than the prevailing rate at occupancy — a further limit on DC collections beyond the bylaw's rate cuts. Defeated on a recorded vote, 4 for / 13 against (5 absent; Chair Jolliffe voted against but is appointed and not a candidate).
votes.verification_notes: Transcribed 2026-07-06 from the official May 21, 2026 Regional Council minutes (item I.2.4, 'Motion to Amend #2 - Capping DC rates at prevailing rate at occupancy'). Recorded vote as published: For: Del Duca, DiPaola, Ferri, Li (4). Against: G. Chan, Davison, Jolliffe, Jones, Lovatt, Mrakas, Pellegrini, Quirk, Racco, Scarpitti, Taylor, Vegh, West (13). Absent: M. Chan, Hackson, Ho, Jackson, Rosati (5).
